title: Lead Instructional Designer at Mumbai University

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Mumbai University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Mumbai University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Coimbatore-based team.

About Mumbai University:
Mumbai University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mumbai University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
